mapper.sql: t.id, t.title, t.content, t.user_id, t.status, t.category, t.has_reward, t.recruit_count, t.create_time, t.update_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM application a WHERE a.task_id = t.id AND a.status = 0) AS apply_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM application a WHERE a.task_id = t.id AND a.status = 1) AS approved_count
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (title, content, user_id, status, category, has_reward, recruit_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, 0, #{category}, #{hasReward}, #{recruitCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM task t WHERE t.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM task t ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM task t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM task t WHERE t.id IN (SELECT a.task_id FROM application a WHERE a.applicant_id = #{applicantId} AND a.status = 1) ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE task SET status = #{expiredStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 0 AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
